entity.summary: Decentralized exchange and liquidity platform built around MAP Protocol interoperability, providing token swaps, liquidity pools, Bitcoin-ecosystem asset liquidity, trading-volume and TVL surfaces, and multi-network asset exchange support.
entity.notes: The current first-party application is reachable. Official HiveSwap interface code identifies HiveSwap as a swap and liquidity service for Bitcoin-ecosystem and EVM assets using MAP Protocol interoperability. HEI consolidates HiveSwap V2/V3 discovery rows into one entity rather than splitting exchange versions.

evidence.title: HiveSwap application
evidence.notes: Current first-party HiveSwap application endpoint is reachable and presents the live HiveSwap product surface.

evidence.title: HiveSwap interface product description
evidence.notes: First-party interface source describes HiveSwap as a Bitcoin-ecosystem swap using MAP Protocol interoperability, exposes trading volume and TVL data, and documents swaps, liquidity services, Bitcoin/EVM asset exchange, liquidity pools, and liquidity mining.

evidence.title: MAP Protocol maintained resource list
evidence.notes: MAP Protocol's maintained first-party resource list records HiveSwap liquidity-pool and yield-farming materials, corroborating the exchange's role in the MAP Protocol ecosystem.
